name: codex-status-bar
description: Native macOS menu bar telemetry for Codex lifecycle activity.

interface.shortDescription: Show rich Codex progress in the macOS menu bar.
interface.longDescription: Codex Status Bar installs lifecycle hooks that maintain a small local status file and launch a native macOS menu bar app showing running sessions, approvals, progress, completed work, and active duration.
defaultPrompt: Help me verify Codex Status Bar
